name: Marinated Prune Ice Cream Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the prunes in cognac for at least 12 hours.
2. Cut the prunes in half and remove the pits. Finely chop one-half of the prunes and set aside. Mix the chopped prunes into the ice cream and fill the terrine mold. Freeze until firm.
3. Toast and finely chop the hazelnuts.
4. Dip the terrine in hot water for a few seconds to loosen it. Unmold, then cut into slices and serve with prune halves. Sprinkle with cognac marinade and chopped hazelnuts.
